meta_title: Minor Surgery — Coming Soon | My Private Clinic — Fulwood, Preston
meta_description: Mole removal, cyst removal, lipoma removal, skin tag removal and ingrown toenail treatment coming soon to My Private Clinic, Fulwood, Preston. Dr Faizal Secretary.
hero_sub: Mole removal, cyst removal, lipoma removal, skin tag removal and ingrown toenail treatment are coming to My Private Clinic. In-clinic procedures by Dr Faizal Secretary — no long NHS waiting list.
intro_quote: You've been on the NHS waiting list for months. It's not urgent enough to be prioritised. But it's affecting you.
intro_heading: Minor Surgery in Preston — Coming Soon
intro_para_1: Minor surgical procedures — mole removal, cyst removal, lipoma removal, skin tag removal and ingrown toenail treatment — are coming to My Private Clinic.
intro_para_2: All procedures performed by Dr Faizal Secretary in a clinical environment. No NHS waiting list. Launching Spring 2026.

faqs.question: What minor surgical procedures will be available?
faqs.answer: Mole removal, cyst removal, lipoma removal, skin tag removal and ingrown toenail treatment. Further procedures may be added.

faqs.question: When is minor surgery launching?
faqs.answer: We are targeting Spring 2026. Register your interest to be notified when booking opens.

faqs.question: How do I register my interest?
faqs.answer: Call or WhatsApp us on 07424 172034 or email hello@myprivate.clinic.
